company.name: Union Trading Co.
company.closing: Together, we build connections that power a better tomorrow.
company.about: At UNION, we believe in the journey, not the destination. Our Corporate Vision and Mission statements are fundamental in our success and will drive us to perform even better. Our Vision - To be the leading distributor and retail operator in the market segments in which we operate. Our Mission - To deliver continuous market leadership for the brands we represent in Retail, FMCG and Electrical Appliances by providing Outstanding Customer Satisfaction. Our Core Values - Trust, commitment, honesty and respect; values which others are only discovering today, but to which people at UNION have been committed for more than 60 years.
